[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011110 4
1 0111111 6
2 0100011 3
3 0011111 5
4 0010000 1
5 1110011 5
6 0000100 1
7 0011110 4

01 10 1111111 a
12 21 0011111 5 match 3
23 32 1110011 5 match 5
34 43 1110111 6
45 54 0011110 4 match 0 7
56 65 0111111 6 match 1
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1110111 6

02 20 1110111 6
13 31 1111111 a
24 42 0010100 2
35 53 1111111 a
46 64 0111111 6 match 1
57 75 1011110 5
60 06 1111111 a
71 17 1011111 6

03 30 1110111 6
14 41 0011111 5 match 3
25 52 0011110 4 match 0 7
36 63 1111111 a
47 74 1010100 3
50 05 1111111 a
61 16 0111111 6 match 1
72 27 1010100 3

04 40 1110111 6
15 51 0011111 5 match 3
26 62 0111111 6 match 1
37 73 1110111 6
[completion]
